title: Add `--version` flag to the `sy` CLI
description:
## Summary

`sy --version` currently errors instead of printing the version string. Wire up the version from `pyproject.toml` so users can confirm which build they're running.

## Acceptance Criteria

* `sy --version` prints `Symphony <version>` (e.g. `Symphony 0.1.0`) and exits 0.
* Version value is read from the package metadata (`importlib.metadata`) — not hardcoded.

## Implementation Hint

In the CLI entry point, add a `--version` option that reads `importlib.metadata.version("symphony")` and prints + exits 0.
